summary: Iteration 4 testing completed successfully. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). All new features verified: Sidebar shows 'AGRICULTURE' instead of 'KrishiRakshak', camera feed config endpoint returns empty URLs as expected, chat mode returns 'gemini' (OLLAMA_URL empty), crop prediction ML model working with RandomForest. Rover and Drone pages show placeholder UI when feed URLs are empty.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working. Sidebar shows 'AGRICULTURE' section header. Camera feed URLs are configurable via ROVER_FEED_URL and DRONE_FEED_URL in backend/.env. Chat mode is 'gemini' when OLLAMA_URL is empty. Crop prediction uses RandomForest model (crop_model.pkl).

camera_feed_config.note: Empty strings returned when env vars are empty

chat_mode_endpoint.note: Returns 'gemini' when OLLAMA_URL is empty, 'ollama' when configured

crop_prediction.returns: crop name, confidence (0-1), top_3 array, model_type

dashboard_sensor_data.displays: Soil Moisture, Temperature, Humidity, Soil Temperature

real_ml_models: Crop prediction uses real ML model (crop_model.pkl - RandomForest)
Irrigation prediction uses real ML model (irrigation_model.pkl - RandomForest)
Chatbot uses real Gemini AI (gemini-3-pro-preview via Emergent LLM Key)

ollama_support.to_enable_ollama: Set OLLAMA_URL=http://localhost:11434 and optionally OLLAMA_MODEL=llama3 in backend/.env
